title: SANA-WM, a 2.6B open-source world model for 1-minute 720p video
summary: NVIDIA introduces SANA-WM, a 2.6 billion parameter open-source world model capable of generating 1-minute, 720p videos. It focuses on long-duration, high-resolution video generation, aiming to advance world modeling for AI systems by simulating realistic, temporally consistent scenes.
